## Verification

- [ ] Draft demonstration build passes.
- [ ] Minified production build passes.
- [ ] Relevant light, dark, mobile, and print behaviour was checked.
- [ ] Visual changes include screenshots containing only fictional content.
- [ ] New or changed fixtures are clearly fictional, generic, and marked `demo: true`.
- [ ] No real person, institution, project, domain, publication, or private asset was added.
- [ ] No Node.js application framework, Tailwind, or third-party CDN dependency was added.
- [ ] Breaking front matter, template, or CSS changes are recorded in `CHANGELOG.md`.
- [ ] Upstream-derived changes identify their source commit and preserve attribution.
